title: Art Exchange (Sept 5–Dec 9)
short_description: Visitors of all ages are invited to stop by the museum’s Ryan Learning Center and choose from a variety of activities: create an art project, explore the Multisensory Gallery, make a custom museum tour with JourneyMaker, and more.
description:
Visitors of all ages are invited to stop by the museum’s Ryan Learning Center and choose from a variety of activities: create an art project, explore the Multisensory Gallery, make a custom museum tour with JourneyMaker, and more. 

Join us this fall for the Artist’s Studio: Story Columns, an architectural drawing activity inspired by Germane Barnes: Columnar Disorder. This engagement is offered daily in the Art Exchange through December 9, 2024.
